chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-34 of 2020 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1. For hearing of CMA No.140/2020 2. For hearing of main case 25.2.2025 Mr. Darvesh K. Mandhan advocate for the petitioner Qazi Abdul Hameed Siddiqui, DAG Mr. Azad Hussain advocate holds brief for Mr. Muhammad Bilal Bhatti advocate for respondents No.1, 2 and 3 Per learned counsel, the finalization of assessment is pending due to this petition. He states that it may be just and proper for the Department to finalize the assessment in accordance with law after providing an opportunity of hearing to the petitioner, however, pending to the aforesaid no further coercive action may be taken against the petitioner. Learned counsel for the Department articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that the petition may be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Zahid/*
